g.text: Compiled Bytecode Program — SELECT name FROM users WHERE age > 25
addr 0 | Init | p1=0 | p2=1 | p3=0 | jump to OpenRead
addr 1 | OpenRead | cur=0 | root=5| cols=3 | open users (root page 5, 3 cols)
addr 2 | Rewind | cur=0 | p2=10 | 0 | first leaf; jump Close if empty
addr 3 | Column | cur=0 | col=1 | R1 | age (col 1) → register R1
addr 4 | Integer | 25 | R2 | 0 | constant 25 → register R2
addr 5 | IsNull | R1 | p2=9 | 0 | if age IS NULL jump OP_NEXT
addr 6 | Le | R1 | p2=9 | R2 | if R1<=R2 jump addr 9 (skip row)
addr 7 | Column | cur=0 | col=0 | R3 | name (col 0) → register R3
addr 8 | ResultRow | R3 | cnt=1 | 0 | emit R3 via callback
addr 9 | Next | cur=0 | p2=3 | 0 | advance cursor; loop to addr 3
GREEN fill | PASS | predicate TRI_FALSE → row reaches ResultRow
RED fill | FAIL | predicate TRI_TRUE → jump to OP_NEXT
Dashed red arrow | short-circuit | OP_LE jump bypasses Column + ResultRow
R1 | VAL_NULL | age slot (filled per row)
R3 | VAL_NULL | name slot (filled per row)
Result Stream (user callback receives these rows)

text.tspan: // OP_OPEN_READ: open B-tree cursor on root page 5
// OP_REWIND: descend to leftmost leaf page
// OP_OPEN_READ: open B-tree cursor on root page 5
// OP_REWIND: descend to leftmost leaf page
// if cell_index >= cell_count: ascend + descend next leaf

g.text: if (has_more) pc = 3; // loop back to OP_COLUMN
else pc++; // fall through to OP_CLOSE
